violations.text: The establishment does not employ an individual with the Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as subs in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

-Hot grab and go foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. -Bulk bakery products to disclose major allergens contained in each product New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

1. The digital display of temperature for the topping cold hold unit was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Ice accumulation observed in well of unit. Ambient temperature of unit was observed at 30 degrees Fahrenheit. 2. Pizza hot holding unit was in poor repair. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and barrels of stagnant water. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The vent above the food drawers and the floors in the food prep area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The coving by ovens is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
